title: LifeSteal - Akar1881
description: A feature-rich LifeSteal plugin for Minecraft servers that adds an exciting heart-stealing mechanic with PvP/PvE cycles, ally system, and bounty hunting.
body:
## ⚠️ Project Archived — See the Successor / Alternative

This **Lifesteal** plugin is now **archived**. I no longer have time to maintain it, so it will receive *no further updates (bug fixes, new features, MC version support, etc.)*.

---

### 📖 What this was  
Lifesteal introduced a **life-steal mechanic** to Minecraft PvP/SMP gameplay: when a player kills another, they gain hearts and the victim loses hearts.  
Additional features included **heart items** (withdraw, trade, redeem), configurable max/min health, custom messages, and full config flexibility.  

---

### 👉 Use another maintained plugin / fork  
If you like the Lifesteal concept, I recommend switching to a plugin that is **actively maintained** or a community fork with ongoing support.  

---

### 📌 Notes & Permissions  
- This version will **not** be updated further.  
- **You are free to fork, reuse, or adapt the code if you want to.**  
- I may read bug reports but can’t promise timely support.  
- Use at your own risk (especially on newer Minecraft versions).
